title: Mempool Purging and Rolling Minimum Fee
description: How a node raises its rolling minimum relay feerate under mempool pressure and evicts transactions below that threshold as the mempool is trimmed. This is local policy and eviction behavior, not consensus or fee estimation.

resources.title: Bitcoin Core Policy Documentation
resources.notes: Canonical explanation of mempool policy, minimum relay feerates, and eviction behavior.

resources.title: getmempoolinfo RPC
resources.notes: Shows the current mempool size, memory usage, and rolling minimum fee rate exposed by Bitcoin Core.

resources.title: Mempool.space FAQ
resources.notes: Operational view of mempool fullness, stuck transactions, and the purging fee rate shown by the explorer.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Background for mempool behavior, feerates, relay policy, and transaction confirmation tradeoffs.
